raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Vr tas notikkahs zet-
Etortápadesmitá Gaddá
cta Kehnixa Iskiuns/ tad
zehlehs Saneribs tas Kehnisch
no Affirijas us angichu prett
wifteem stipreem Pilsfahiteem
eekich Juhda/ un usnehme tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch no Affi-
rtjas fuhtija Rabsaku no Lakisa
us Jerusalemi pee ta Kehnixa
Iskiuns ar warren leelu Karra-
Spehku/ un wiꞥſch stahweja pee
teem Uhdens Stohbreen ta aug-
schaja Dihka Zettmallá/ pee ta
Wadmalneeka Tihruina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tsgabje pee winna E-
tjakims Illijus Dehls/ tas An-
meisteris/ un Sebna tas Skrih-
werts/ un Joaks Afawa Dehls/
tas Kanzleris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Rabsakus fazzija us
teem: Sakkajt jelle Iskiun:
Ta fakka tas leels Kehnisch/tas
Kehnisch no Affirijas: Kastas
tahds Patwerums us ko tu pa-
taujees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buhs man fazz iht/ ka weh!
Padohms un Stiprums irr us
Ratru/ tad jo tas trr weens ne-
leetis Wahrs/ us ko tu tad pa-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ pataujees tu ue
falubfufschn Needras-Rohku
Egipti? us ko kad kas atsp
schahs/ tad ees tas winnam za
Dubri / un durk winnu za
Tapatt irr Waraifs tas Egip
fehnisch wiffeem teem/ kas
winnu pataujahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tu us man ta-
Mehs pataujamees us to Ku
Gll muhsfu Deewu. Neg
wiꞥſch tas irr/ ka Augstuin
un Altarus Iskiuns irr nop-
stijs? un us Juhdu un Jerusa-
mi fazzijs: Preeksch fchi Alta-
buhs jums peeluhgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ falibafsti jelle
mannu Kungu to Kehnixen
Affirijas/ un es dohſchu tew
wi tuhkſtoschus Sirgns/warr
tu jewim Jahtneekus doht / k
us teem warr jaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka warresti tu tad weer
weenigu Kungu no teem wiſfi
masakeem Kalpeem manna Kun
ga atpakkat dsıht? bet tu pata-
jces us Egipti / to Rattu u
Jahtneeku deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Woj tu arri dohma / t
es esmu bes ta KUNGA ze-
lees prett fcho Semuni win-
famaitaht? tas KUNGS irr u
man fazzijs : Zelfees prett fch
Semuni/ un famaita to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Elijakims
un Sebna/ un Joaks us Rab-
sku: Runna lubdsans us ta-
weein Kalpeem sihriski/ jo ueh-
to gan prohtaim/ un ne runna u
mum
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
